title: Report on the proposed subsidy to Offshore Wind and Related Network Sectors Supply Chain Subsidy Scheme by Great British Energy
body: "The SAU has published its report providing advice to GBE concerning its proposed scheme.  The report sets out the SAU’s evaluation of GBE’s Assessment of Compliance of its proposed subsidy scheme with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the proposed Offshore Wind and Related Network Sectors Supply Chain Subsidy Scheme by Great British Energy case page.  "
